subtitle: An artificial white beach of crushed Cebu dolomite, laid over a polluted urban bay along Roxas Boulevard in 2020.
spike_statement: A ₱389-million government beautification project that covered a 500-meter stretch of Manila Bay's gray seawall with crushed white dolomite in 2020, famous for sunsets and for the controversy it triggered.

levers.photo_tone: Roxas Boulevard sunset gold over a flat gray bay, the dolomite reading chalk-white and faintly artificial against the city
